full_text:
Sheng Chong зӣӣеҶІ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sheng Chong (зӣӣеҶІ). Tutor to Sun Xiu, his blunt and direct manner worried Zhang Bu. Sheng Chong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
